Voice.name: Roger - Laid-Back, Casual, Resonant
Voice.description: Easy going and perfect for casual conversations.

Voice.name: Sarah - Mature, Reassuring, Confident
Voice.description: Young adult woman with a confident and warm, mature quality and a reassuring, professional tone.

Voice.name: Laura - Enthusiast, Quirky Attitude
Voice.description: This young adult female voice delivers sunny enthusiasm with a quirky attitude.

Voice.name: Charlie - Deep, Confident, Energetic
Voice.description: A young Australian male with a confident and energetic voice.

Voice.name: George - Warm, Captivating Storyteller
Voice.description: Warm resonance that instantly captivates listeners.

Voice.name: Callum - Husky Trickster
Voice.description: Deceptively gravelly, yet unsettling edge.

Voice.name: River - Relaxed, Neutral, Informative
Voice.description: A relaxed, neutral voice ready for narrations or conversational projects.

Voice.name: Harry - Fierce Warrior
Voice.description: An animated warrior ready to charge forward.

Voice.name: Liam - Energetic, Social Media Creator
Voice.description: A young adult with energy and warmth - suitable for reels and shorts.

Voice.name: Alice - Clear, Engaging Educator
Voice.description: Clear and engaging, friendly woman with a British accent suitable for e-learning.

Voice.name: Matilda - Knowledgable, Professional
Voice.description: A professional woman with a pleasing alto pitch. Suitable for many use cases.

Voice.name: Will - Relaxed Optimist
Voice.description: Conversational and laid back.

Voice.name: Jessica - Playful, Bright, Warm
Voice.description: Young and popular, this playful American female voice is perfect for trendy content.

Voice.name: Eric - Smooth, Trustworthy
Voice.description: A smooth tenor pitch from a man in his 40s - perfect for agentic use cases.

Voice.name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
Voice.description: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

Voice.name: Chris - Charming, Down-to-Earth
Voice.description: Natural and real, this down-to-earth voice is great across many use-cases.

Voice.name: Brian - Deep, Resonant and Comforting
Voice.description: Middle-aged man with a resonant and comforting tone. Great for narrations and advertisements.

Voice.name: Daniel - Steady Broadcaster
Voice.description: A strong voice perfect for delivering a professional broadcast or news story.

Voice.name: Lily - Velvety Actress
Voice.description: Velvety British female voice delivers news and narrations with warmth and clarity.

Voice.name: Adam - Dominant, Firm
Voice.description: A bright tenor pitch that immediately cuts through. The delivery is brash and openly confident, speaking with unwavering certainty and a slightly aggressive self-assurance.

Voice.name: Bill - Wise, Mature, Balanced
Voice.description: Friendly and comforting voice ready to narrate your stories.

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.plain.com wss://*.plain.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com https://*.plain.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
headers.access-control-allow-methods: POST, PATCH, OPTIONS, DELETE, GET, PUT
